title: Reimagined Tools and Weapons
description: This texture pack modifies Minecraft's tools textures to give them a new and enhanced look, suitable for survival games.
body:
This texture pack modifies minecraft's tools textures to give them a new and enhanced look, suitable for survival games.

Here is a list of all modifications this pack offers:
- Wooden tools take a natural look with vines and moss, as it they were crafted by hand
- Stone tools are given a more flint-ish appearence and an irregular shape
- Red highlights are added on iron tools to give them more details
- Diamond tools are more sharp and more agressive
- Netherite tools flow with lava as is they were infused with the flames of the nether.

Gold tools remain unchanged, nobody uses them anyways.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix
